data.id: TR-PICUS-TIER2-ADVANCED_LOG_EVASION: Advanced Log Clearing and Forensics Evasion
data.name: TR-PICUS-TIER2-ADVANCED_LOG_EVASION: Advanced Log Clearing via fsutil, PowerShell, and Custom Tools
data.description: HIGH PRIORITY FORENSICS EVASION DETECTION: Detects advanced log clearing methods observed in 10+ undetected Picus instances. Existing alerts only catch basic wevtutil.exe clearing; threat actors use fsutil usn deletejournal, PowerShell ETW disabling, and custom evasion tools. Monitors for fsutil operations on USN journal, PowerShell event log manipulation, and ETW disabling techniques. Observable from detonation: fsutil.exe deleting journal entries, powershell.exe with Clear-EventLog or ETW disabling cmdlets, custom forensics evasion tools. Critical for T1070 (Indicator Removal on Host).
data.contents: (process.name contains 'fsutil.exe' AND process.command_line contains 'usn' AND process.command_line contains 'deletejournal') OR (process.name contains 'powershell.exe' AND (process.command_line contains 'Clear-EventLog' OR process.command_line contains 'Remove-EventLog' OR process.command_line contains 'ETW' OR process.command_line contains 'EventTracing' OR process.command_line contains 'Wdigest' OR process.command_line contains 'LogPS' OR process.command_line contains '-Disable')) OR (process.name contains 'wevtutil.exe' AND process.command_line contains 'clear-log') OR (process.path contains '\\Temp\\' AND process.command_line contains 'log')

techniques.name: Indicator Removal on Host: File Deletion
Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify System Firewall
